The '''Long Shot''' was a modified [[Lantillian ShipWrights/Legends|Lantillian ShipWrights]] [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|GX1 short hauler]]<ref name="rc">''[[The Star Wars Rules Companion]]''</ref> captained by the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Ixsthmus]] for several missions for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. His crew consisted of his [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] first mate [[Siene Symm]] and the droids [[R2-V0]] and [[Four-Onebee]]. As of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] the ship had already served the rebel [[The Irregulars|Irregular]] unit [[Reekeene's Roughnecks]] for several years and some members of [[Green squad]] division of the Roughnecks often used the vessel as a mobile headquarter.<ref name=":0">''[[Star Wars Campaign Pack]]''</ref> 

==History==
The ''Long Shot'' was originally purchased as a pleasure yacht for an Imperial Admiral and later stolen from a [[Callonia|Callonian]] spaceport by members of the rebel unit [[Reekeene's Roughnecks]].<ref name=":0" />

After being acquired by the Roughnecks the ship recieved new [[Transponder code/Legends|Transponder codes]], its sublight engines and shields were improved and the galley, holotheatre, starboard passenger pod, and geriatric suites were replaced by a supply room, machine shop, supply pod and brig respectively. Two illegal [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] were also added to the exterior of the ship.<ref name=":0" />

===The ''Long Shot''{{'s}} missions ===
The ''Long Shot'' was sent to a diplomatic mission on the terrestrial planet of [[Abonshee]] to trade Alliance's doctors, teachers and engineers in exchange for supplies. While members of Green squad were on the planet negotiating with Abonshee's leader [[Godking]] [[Trisstan]], the damaged [[Curich-class shuttle|''Curich''-class imperial shuttle]] [[Resurgence (Curich-class)|''Resurgence'']] transporting [[Dixton|Moff Dixton]] landed just outside of the [[Godking's castle]]. While the ''Long Shot''<nowiki/>'s Captain and first mate had to temporarily take the vessel off-planet to avoid the imperial shuttle's scanners, Green squad managed to capture Dixton and convince the Godking to join the Alliance.<ref>''[[Classic Campaigns]]''</ref>

The ''Long Shot'' was sent to a mission on the volcanic planet [[Alabash]], ferrying a squad of Reekeene's Roughnecks that would pretend to be inspectors from the [[Imperial Resource Procurement Bureau]]. The ship was refueled and resupplied, and her markings were changed to match the squad's cover.

The ''Long Shot'' was later sent to the planet [[Iyuta]] when General [[Reekeene]] wanted a listening device to be placed on an Imperial communication center there.

During a later long mission of surveillance near Iyuta, the crew of the ''Long Shot'' discovered that the Empire had captured General Reekeene and sent her to a garrison on [[Flankers]], a planet that would be destroyed by a [[Nova/Legends|nova]] in a matter of days. Ixsthmus headed to Flankers. Once there, Imperial forces identified the ''Long Shot'' as an enemy ship and fired on it, while Symm tried to dodge the attacks and keep everybody informed of the countdown.

At a later point, Reekeene's Rougnecks modified the ''Long Shot'' to increase the ship's sublight speed.<ref name="rc" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Long Shot'' first appeared in the ''[[Star Wars Campaign Pack]]'' as a sample ship for any party of player characters.
